content: Fix two-way player handling in _is_offensive_role (P/DH should be offensive)
Run pytest suite — verify all tests green (target file + regressions)
Add hydrate_team_offensive_roster() helper in mlb_stats_api.py (active roster with hitting stats, with cache)
Integrate compute_offensive_injury_impact into mlb_day_orchestrator.py (apply multipliers, persist pick_payload + pipeline_meta)
Build collapsible OffensiveInjuryImpactPanel.jsx (LOW=green, MEDIUM=amber, HIGH=red) mirroring TailRiskPanel pattern
Backend + Frontend testing via testing_agent (end-to-end validation)
